ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who created the listing */,
  "number_of_listings" INTEGER /* Number of items available in the listing */,
  "regular_price" REAL /* Regular price of the listing */,
  "bundle_price" REAL /* Price for a bundle of listings */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the listing belongs */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_bundle" INTEGER /* Indicates if the listing is a bundle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the listing */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the seller's account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the seller's account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing to which the discount applies */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount offered */,
  "savings" REAL /* Amount saved due to the discount */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Unique discount code */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the discount is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the discount */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing associated with the metrics */,
  "savings_per_ad" REAL /* Savings per advertisement for the listing */,
  "total_savings" REAL /* Total savings accrued from discounts */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate of the listing */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate of the listing */,
  "average_savings_per_user" REAL /* Average savings per user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the metric */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_metrics_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the category */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bundle_discount" (
  "bundle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bundle discount */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing associated with the bundle discount */,
  "bundle_discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount for the bundle */,
  "bundle_name" TEXT /* Name of the bundle */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bundle discount is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the bundle discount */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the bundle discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bundle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bundle_discount_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing engaged with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the listing */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, click, purchase) */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "engagement_value" REAL /* Value of the engagement (e.g., duration of the view) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the engagement */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing associated with the promotion */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Unique promotion code */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the promotion */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_options" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping option */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing associated with this shipping option */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Type of shipping method (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for this option */,
  "estimated_delivery_days" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery days for the shipping option */,
  "is_express" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shipping option is express */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the shipping option */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the shipping option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_options_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the listing sold */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if a discount was applied to the sale */,
  "promotion_applied" INTEGER /* Indicates if a promotion was applied to the sale */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation date of the sale */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last updated date of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)
